apiClassifier.shortdesc: This helper class contains constant values defined in the libc headers.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This helper class contains constant values defined in the libc headers.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This interface exposes all of the FreeBSD kernel system calls.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This interface exposes all of the FreeBSD kernel system calls. To provide reasonable implementations you will need to look at the BSD documentation and also at the BSD libc source code.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This is the default implementation of the Posix interface.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This is the default implementation of the Posix interface. Extending and overriding methods in this class allow you to customize the handling of the basic syscalls on top of which libc operates.

apiConstructor.shortdesc: Construct the default IKernel implementation used by flascc.

apiConstructorDetail.apiDesc: Construct the default IKernel implementation used by flascc. If an alternate implementation has not already been assigned to the CModule.kernel property, then this class will be constructed on first access.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: TODO: ignores A_clock_id, assumes a value of CLOCK_REALTIME

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: TODO: ignores A_clock_id, assumes a value of CLOCK_REALTIME

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: The default implementation always returns 42

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The default implementation always returns 42

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Not implemented; always returns -1.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: By default, this preloader is injected into every flascc-generated SWF.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc:
By default, this preloader is injected into every flascc-generated SWF. After detecting that the SWF has fully loaded, it constructs a new Console object, which should cause the SWF to execute.
If a suitable HTTPBackingStore has been linked into the SWF, it will be be created and the SWF will only start once the contents have been downloaded.
To replace the default preloader, you should compile this class to a SWF and tell gcc/g++ to use it with the argument "-swf-preloader=foo.swf". Alternatively, if you don't want a preloader, use "-no-swf-preloader".

apiConstructor.shortdesc: Construct the flascc preloader that is injected into every SWF by default.

apiConstructorDetail.apiDesc: Construct the flascc preloader that is injected into every SWF by default.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: A BackingStore that uses a URLLoader to load its files.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc:
A BackingStore that uses a URLLoader to load its files. This requires a manifest.as file to be generated by the "genfs" tool in the flascc SDK. After being constructed, an instance of this BackingStore will start downloading the files from the manifest. You can listen to the progress, complete and ioerror events to monitor download progress.
After a download has completed it is added to the VFS and is available for use.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This interface describes how an underlying data store interacts with the flascc virtual filesystem.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This interface describes how an underlying data store interacts with the flascc virtual filesystem. Implement this interface to customize the backing store for the VFS. Backing stores are added to the VFS via the IBackingStore.addBackingStore method.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Adds a file into the filesystem with a given path and contents.

apiParam.apiDesc: The path to the file.
The contents of the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Adds a file into the filesystem with a given path and contents. Ownership of the ByteArray is assumed to transfer to the BackingStore with this method.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Deletes a file from the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The path to the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Deletes a file from the filesystem.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Writes any changes to the underlying store.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Writes any changes to the underlying store.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Retrieves the contents of a file from this BackingStore.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The contents of the file.

apiParam.apiDesc: The path to the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Retrieves the contents of a file from this BackingStore.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Retrieves all of the files paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A Vector of all file paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Retrieves all of the files paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Determines whether a path refers to a directory.

apiReturn.apiDesc: true if the path refers to a directory, false otherwise.

apiParam.apiDesc: The path to be checked.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Determines whether a path refers to a directory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Determines whether a path refers to a file or directory.

apiReturn.apiDesc: true if the path refers to a file or a directory, false otherwise.

apiParam.apiDesc: The path to be checked.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Determines whether a path refers to a file or directory.

apiValue.shortdesc: Determines whether the filesystem may be changed.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Determines whether the filesystem may be changed.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: A collection of path handling related functions

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: A collection of path handling related functions

apiOperation.shortdesc: Return everything except the last component of the supplied path.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Return everything except the last component of the supplied path.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Return a path equivalent to the argument, with these properties: 1.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Return a path equivalent to the argument, with these properties: 1. is absolute (will always have a leading '/') 2. doesn't contain '.' or '..' 3. never has a trailing '/', even if the argument path did 4. never has two or more "/" characters in a row TODO: Relative paths are assumed to be relative to the current working directory.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: The default implementation of the IVFS interface

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: The default implementation of the IVFS interface

apiConstructor.shortdesc: The default implementation of the IVFS interface

apiConstructorDetail.apiDesc: The default implementation of the IVFS interface

apiOperation.shortdesc: Mounts a backing store as part of the VFS.

apiParam.apiDesc: The backing store containing the files to add.
The path to the mount point for this backing store. This must be an empty directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Mounts a backing store as part of the VFS. Once this method returns, files contained within the backing store will be available to the application.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Adds an empty directory to the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the directory to be added.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Adds an empty directory to the filesystem. The directory must not already exist.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Adds a file to the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file to be added.
The contents of the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Adds a file to the filesystem. The file must not already exist.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Add a special file to the filesystem.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A table entry describing the new file.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the special file.
The callback object for the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Add a special file to the filesystem. Special files are different from regular files in that they don't have any stored contents. Instead calls to read and write for a special file are routed to a callback object. Special files are never persisted across different runs of the application.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Checks a proposed path for a new file.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A CheckPathResult describing any problems with the proposed file name, if any.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Checks a proposed path for a new file.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Closes a file.

apiParam.apiDesc: A file descriptor returned from openFile.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Closes a file. Once this method returns, the file descriptor is no longer valid.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Deletes a file (or directory) from the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file to be deleted.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Deletes a file (or directory) from the filesystem. The file must exist, and if it is a directory, it must be empty.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Retrieves the contents of a directory.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A Vector of FileHandles, one per file in the directory, or null if the directory does not exist.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Retrieves the contents of a directory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The FileHandle corresponding to the file descriptor, or null if the file descriptor is not valid.

apiParam.apiDesc: A file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Resolves a path to a file.

apiReturn.apiDesc: An FileHandle instance for the file, or null if the file does not exist.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Resolves a path to a file.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Determines whether the argument is a valid file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: true if the file descriptor is a valid file descriptor corresponding to an open file, false otherwise.

apiParam.apiDesc: A integer that may or may not be a file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Determines whether the argument is a valid file descriptor.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Opens a file and assigns it a file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The file descriptor assigned to this file.

apiParam.apiDesc: A FileHandle instance for the file to be opened.
If specified, the file descriptor to assign. Must not already be a valid file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Opens a file and assigns it a file descriptor. A file descriptor is a non-negative integer, which remains valid until closeFile is called.

apiValue.shortdesc: Set the console for the filesystem.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Set the console for the filesystem. This associates the file "/dev/tty" with the console object. When the applications writes to stdout and stderr, the console object will be called back.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This enum class contains the results determined by the checkPath method.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This enum class contains the results determined by the checkPath method. It should be used by implemetations of the IKernel interface but not by end-user code.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: IVFS describes the interface to the flascc virtual filesystem, which controls how the filesystem appears to an flascc application.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: IVFS describes the interface to the flascc virtual filesystem, which controls how the filesystem appears to an flascc application. It is possible for user code to implement this interface, though there is a default implementation, DefaultVFS. The CModule.getVFS method returns the current VFS.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Mounts a backing store as part of the VFS.

apiParam.apiDesc: The backing store containing the files to add.
The path to the mount point for this backing store. This must be an empty directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Mounts a backing store as part of the VFS. Once this method returns, files contained within the backing store will be available to the application.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Adds an empty directory to the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the directory to be added.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Adds an empty directory to the filesystem. The directory must not already exist.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Adds a file to the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file to be added.
The contents of the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Adds a file to the filesystem. The file must not already exist.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Add a special file to the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the special file.
The callback object for the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Add a special file to the filesystem. Special files are different from regular files in that they don't have any stored contents. Instead calls to read and write for a special file are routed to a callback object. Special files are never persisted across different runs of the application.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Checks a proposed path for a new file.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A value from the CheckPath enum class describing any problems with the proposed file name, if any.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Checks a proposed path for a new file.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Closes a file.

apiParam.apiDesc: A file descriptor returned from openFile.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Closes a file. Once this method returns, the file descriptor is no longer valid.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Deletes a file (or directory) from the filesystem.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file to be deleted.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Deletes a file (or directory) from the filesystem. The file must exist, and if it is a directory, it must be empty.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Retrieves the contents of a directory.

apiReturn.apiDesc: An array of FileHandle instances, one per file in the directory, or null if the directory does not exist.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Retrieves the contents of a directory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The FileHandle corresponding to the file descriptor, or null if the file descriptor is not valid.

apiParam.apiDesc: A file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The FileHandle corresponding to the path, or null if the path cannot be retrieved.

apiParam.apiDesc: The absolute path to the file to be retrieved.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Looks up the FileHandle instance for a file descriptor.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Determines whether the argument is a valid file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: true if the file descriptor is a valid file descriptor corresponding to an open file, false otherwise.

apiParam.apiDesc: A integer that may or may not be a file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Determines whether the argument is a valid file descriptor.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Opens a file and assigns it a file descriptor.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The file descriptor assigned to this file.

apiParam.apiDesc: An FileHandle instance for the file to be opened.
If specified, the file descriptor to assign. Must not already be a valid file descriptor.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Opens a file and assigns it a file descriptor. A file descriptor is a non-negative integer, which remains valid until closeFile is called.

apiValue.shortdesc: Get the current console for the filesystem.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Get the current console for the filesystem. This is the special file "/dev/tty".

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This class represents open files available to an flascc application.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This class represents open files available to an flascc application. It should be used by implementations of the IKernel interface but not by end-user code.

apiValue.shortdesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_APPEND.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_APPEND.

apiValue.shortdesc: The position within the file that read/write operations will occur at.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: The position within the file that read/write operations will occur at.

apiValue.shortdesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_RDWR or if it was not opened as O_WRONLY.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_RDWR or if it was not opened as O_WRONLY.

apiValue.shortdesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_WRONLY or O_RDWR.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: True if this file descriptor was opened with O_WRONLY or O_RDWR.

apiValue.shortdesc: The relative path to the underlying file in the VFS.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: The relative path to the underlying file in the VFS.

apiValue.shortdesc: The BackingStore that owns this FDEntry.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: The BackingStore that owns this FDEntry.

apiValue.shortdesc: If this file descriptor refers to a normal file this will contain the contents of the file.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: If this file descriptor refers to a normal file this will contain the contents of the file.

apiValue.shortdesc: If this file descriptor refers to a special file this references an object implementing the ISpecialFile interface that will be used to handle read/write requests.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: If this file descriptor refers to a special file this references an object implementing the ISpecialFile interface that will be used to handle read/write requests.

apiValue.shortdesc: True if this file descriptor referes to a directory.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: True if this file descriptor referes to a directory.

apiValue.shortdesc: The full path to the file referenced by this file descriptor

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: The full path to the file referenced by this file descriptor

apiClassifier.shortdesc: Extends the InMemoryBackingStore with one that stores and retrieves its data from a Flash Local Shared object (http://www.adobe.com/security/flashplayer/articles/lso/).

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc:
Extends the InMemoryBackingStore with one that stores and retrieves its data from a Flash Local Shared object (http://www.adobe.com/security/flashplayer/articles/lso/).
The contents of this VFS will persist until the user clears their LSO cache (which might happen when they clear their browser cache.)

apiConstructor.shortdesc: Construct an LSOBackingStore using a named local shared object.

asCustoms.name: the name of the Local Shared Object to be used, the property "filemap" will be used to store the VFS.

apiConstructorDetail.apiDesc: Construct an LSOBackingStore using a named local shared object.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Writes all of the files back into the LSO, this might be slow so you need to decide when to call this in your application to balance performance with reliability.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Writes all of the files back into the LSO, this might be slow so you need to decide when to call this in your application to balance performance with reliability.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: The InMemoryBackingStore implements IBackingStore with a memory resident mapping between paths and file data stored as a ByteArray.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc:
The InMemoryBackingStore implements IBackingStore with a memory resident mapping between paths and file data stored as a ByteArray.
This class does not depend on the rest of flascc, so it can be safely used in isolation, such as in a preloader.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Insert a mapping representing a directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Insert a mapping representing a directory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Insert a mapping from path to data into the filemap.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Insert a mapping from path to data into the filemap.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Given an array of strings representing file paths, this method removes the reference to that file from the filemap.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Given an array of strings representing file paths, this method removes the reference to that file from the filemap.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Commits any outstanding changes to the underlying datastore.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Commits any outstanding changes to the underlying datastore. This is a no-op in this class, but could do something useful in a BackingStore that would benefit from buffering some of its actual write operations.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Given a file object returned from makeFileObject this method extracts the contents of that file as a ByteArray

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Given a file object returned from makeFileObject this method extracts the contents of that file as a ByteArray

apiOperation.shortdesc: Retrieves all of the files paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A Vector of all file paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Retrieves all of the files paths contained in this BackingStore.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Checks if a path is a directory.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Checks if a path is a directory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Checks if a path exists.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Checks if a path exists.

apiValue.shortdesc: This BackingStore is read-write, so this always returns false.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: This BackingStore is read-write, so this always returns false.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: This interface is used by the VFS for special files that must be implemented via code rather than a fixed ByteArray.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: This interface is used by the VFS for special files that must be implemented via code rather than a fixed ByteArray. The default Console implementation uses the ISpecialFile interface to handle read/write requests to /dev/tty which corresponds with C/C++ code reading/writting to stdin/stdout. You might also use this interface to implement other special files like "/dev/null" or "/dev/random".

apiOperation.shortdesc: This matches the signature of fcntl from the IKernel interface.

apiReturn.apiDesc: an integer indicating the success or failure of the syscall, see the BSD documentation for expected values

apiParam.apiDesc: The file descriptor being manipulated
An fcntl command
An argument for the given command
A pointer to the location of the errno global variable

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: This matches the signature of fcntl from the IKernel interface.

apiOperation.shortdesc: This matches the signature of ioctl from the IKernel interface.

apiReturn.apiDesc: an integer indicating the success or failure of the syscall, see the BSD documentation for expected values

apiParam.apiDesc: The file descriptor being manipulated
An ioctl request
An argument for the given command
A pointer to the location of the errno global variable

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: This matches the signature of ioctl from the IKernel interface.

apiOperation.shortdesc: This matches the signature of read from the IKernel interface.

apiReturn.apiDesc: an integer indicating the success or failure of the syscall, see the BSD documentation for expected values

apiParam.apiDesc: The file descriptor being read from
A Pointer to the buffer you are expected to fill with data for this read.
The size of the buffer pointed to by bufPtr
A pointer to the location of the errno global variable

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: This matches the signature of read from the IKernel interface.

apiOperation.shortdesc: This matches the signature of write from the IKernel interface.

apiReturn.apiDesc: an integer indicating the success or failure of the syscall, see the BSD documentation for expected values

apiParam.apiDesc: The file descriptor being written to
A Pointer to the buffer containing data to be written to this file descriptor.
The size of the buffer pointed to by bufPtr
A pointer to the location of the errno global variable

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: This matches the signature of write from the IKernel interface.

apiClassifier.shortdesc: Contains convenience functions for reading and writting to domainMemory; also manages any flascc-specific global state (for example, the VFS and Posix interface implementations.)

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: Contains convenience functions for reading and writting to domainMemory; also manages any flascc-specific global state (for example, the VFS and Posix interface implementations.)

apiOperation.shortdesc: Low level API for calling a C/C++ function from Actionscript, returning a 32-bit value

apiReturn.apiDesc: The integer return value of the function. As above, to return complex (possibly AS3) types you should annotate the function as explained in the interop tutorial to give the function a more natural signature and return type.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the function. You can find the address of a C/C++ function by passing the name of the function to getPublicSym.

A Vector containing 32-bit values to pass on the stack to the function. These could either be primitive integer data, or pointers. To pass more complex data types (including AS3 types) you should use the function annotation syntax explained in the interop tutorial to give the function a mopre natural AS3 function signature.
An optional pointer to the base of the stack. A value of 0 means use the current ESP.
Indicates whether the stack pointer should unwind back to the value it was before the function was called.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Low level API for calling a C/C++ function from Actionscript, returning a 32-bit value

apiOperation.shortdesc: Low level API for calling a C/C++ function from Actionscript returning a 64-bit floating point value

apiReturn.apiDesc: The 64-bit floating point return value of the function. As above, to return complex (possibly AS3) types you should annotate the function as explained in the interop tutorial to give the function a more natural signature and return type.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the function. You can find the address of a C/C++ function by passing the name of the function to getPublicSym.

A Vector containing 32-bit values to pass on the stack to the function. These could ewither be primitive integer data, or pointers. To pass more complex data types (including AS3 types) you should use the function annotation syntax explained in the interop tutorial to give the function a mopre natural AS3 function signature.
An optional pointer to the base of the stack. A value of 0 means use the current ESP.
Indicates whether the stack pointer should unwind back to the value it was before the function was called.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Low level API for calling a C/C++ function from Actionscript returning a 64-bit floating point value

apiOperation.shortdesc: Free a pointer that was previously allocated using CModule.malloc().

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Free a pointer that was previously allocated using CModule.malloc(). Internally this calls the libc implementation of free() so it can be used to free pointers allocated in C with malloc().

apiOperation.shortdesc: Lookup the specified publicly defined C/C++ symbol

apiReturn.apiDesc: The address of the symbol. If the symbol was a POD type you can read it's value using one of the read functions. If the symbol was a function then you can call it using callI.

apiParam.apiDesc: The name of the symbol to lookup, for example, "malloc"

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Lookup the specified publicly defined C/C++ symbol

apiOperation.shortdesc: Allocate a buffer in domainMemory and write an actionscript string as UTF8 data into that buffer.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The pointer to the buffer in domainMemory that contains the string. This must be manually freed by passing this pointer to "free()"

apiParam.apiDesc: The string you want to copy into domainMemory

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Allocate a buffer in domainMemory and write an actionscript string as UTF8 data into that buffer.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Allocate size bytes of data within the domainMemory ByteArray.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A pointer to a region of memory within domainMemory size bytes long. Internally this calls the libc implementation of malloc() so the returned value should be treated as though it had been allocated in C with malloc().

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Allocate size bytes of data within the domainMemory ByteArray. The memory must be freed using CModule.free().

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read a 16 bit value from domainMemory with zero padding to extend it to a 32 bit signed integer.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A 16 bit integer zero padded to 32 bit.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to read from

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read a 16 bit value from domainMemory with zero padding to extend it to a 32 bit signed integer. This will always result in positive integers.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read a 32 bit value from domainMemory.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A 32 bit integer.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to read from

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read a 32 bit value from domainMemory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read an 8 bit value from domainMemory with zero padding to extend it to a 32 bit signed integer.

apiReturn.apiDesc: An 8 bit integer zero padded to 32 bit.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to read from

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read an 8 bit value from domainMemory with zero padding to extend it to a 32 bit signed integer. This will always result in positive integers.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Copy data from domainMemory into an object implementing the IDataOutput interface (ByteArray, FileStream, Socket etc)

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to start reading from.
The number of bytes to copy from the domainMemory (starting from ptr)
The IDataOutput to copy data into (the current position in this IDataOutput will be respected and will increase by length)

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Copy data from domainMemory into an object implementing the IDataOutput interface (ByteArray, FileStream, Socket etc)

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read a 64 bit floating point value from domainMemory

apiReturn.apiDesc: A signed 64 bit floating point value

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to read from

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read a 64 bit floating point value from domainMemory

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read a 32 bit floating point value from domainMemory

apiReturn.apiDesc: A signed 32 bit floating point value

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to read from

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read a 32 bit floating point value from domainMemory

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read count integers from the offset ptr in domainMemory into a Vector of ints.

apiReturn.apiDesc: A Vector of ints read from domainMemory

apiParam.apiDesc: The offset in domainMemory to read from
The number of 32 bit integers to read

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read count integers from the offset ptr in domainMemory into a Vector of ints.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Read UTF8 data from domainMemory and construct an Actionscript String

apiReturn.apiDesc: A String constructed from the UTF8 data found between ptr and ptr+length

apiParam.apiDesc: The location in domainMemory to start reading from
The number of bytes to read

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Read UTF8 data from domainMemory and construct an Actionscript String

apiOperation.shortdesc: Console should use this function to check if the SWF has been launched as an isolate so it can act appropriately

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Console should use this function to check if the SWF has been launched as an isolate so it can act appropriately

apiOperation.shortdesc: This method services any pending uiThunk requests that background threads have queued up.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: This method services any pending uiThunk requests that background threads have queued up. A good place to call this would be in the enterFrame handler.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Calls the libc __start1 function which, in turn, causes main() to execute.

apiParam.apiDesc: The current Console object
A vector of Strings that are used to fill the argv array given to main. The first String is typically used to specify the name of the application.
A vector of Strings that are used to populate the environment variables accesible by getenv(). There should be an even number of Strings in this Vector as they are treated as name/value pairs.
Inidcates whether the C stack should be preserved after the call to __start1. If this is set to false the stack depth will return to the value when start() was called upon return.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Calls the libc __start1 function which, in turn, causes main() to execute. Unlike start(), this method handles the case where the main C run loop has been broken by a call to "AS3_GoAsync" within the C code. This allows main to return without allowing C/C++ static initializers to run. This should be used when you want to run long running code with a broken run-loop, or run some code as a library.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Creates a background Worker and runs the libc function __start1 within that Worker.

apiParam.apiDesc: The current Console object
A vector of Strings that are used to fill the argv array given to main. The first String is typically used to specify the name of the application.
A vector of Strings that are used to populate the environment variables accesible by getenv(). There should be an even number of Strings in this Vector as they are treated as name/value pairs.
The amount of stack space to allocate for the ui thread (code that will run the uiThunk callbacks and also any calls to callI coming from the main Worker).

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Creates a background Worker and runs the libc function __start1 within that Worker. This allows you to run main without breaking the run loop, but requires the SWF to be version 18 or higher (Flash Runtime 11.5).

apiOperation.shortdesc: Calls the libc __start1 function which, in turn, causes main() to execute.

apiReturn.apiDesc: The exit code of the C application

apiParam.apiDesc: The current Console object
A vector of Strings that are used to fill the argv array given to main. The first String is typically used to specify the name of the application.
A vector of Strings that are used to populate the environment variables accesible by getenv(). There should be an even number of Strings in this Vector as they are treated as name/value pairs.
Indicates whether the C stack should be preserved after the call to __start1. If this is set to false the stack depth will return to the value when start() was called upon return.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Calls the libc __start1 function which, in turn, causes main() to execute.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write the low 16 bits of value into domainMemory.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to write to
The value to write (only the low 16 bits are written)

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write the low 16 bits of value into domainMemory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write a 32 bit value into domainMemory

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to write to
The value to write

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write a 32 bit value into domainMemory

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write the low 8 bits of value into domainMemory.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to write to
The value to write (only the low 8 bits are written)

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write the low 8 bits of value into domainMemory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Copy the contents of an object that implements the IDataInput interface (ByteArray, FileStream, Socket etc) into domainMemory.

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to start writting to
The number of bytes to copy from the source bytearray (starting from source.position)
The IDataInput to copy data from (the current position in this IDataInput will be used, and will increase by length)

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Copy the contents of an object that implements the IDataInput interface (ByteArray, FileStream, Socket etc) into domainMemory.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write a Number as a 64 bit float into domainMemory

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to write to
The value to write at the address

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write a Number as a 64 bit float into domainMemory

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write a Number as a 32 bit float into domainMemory

apiParam.apiDesc: The address of the location in domainMemory to write to
The value to write at the address (will be rounded to the nearest 32bit floating point value)

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write a Number as a 32 bit float into domainMemory

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write a Vector of ints into domainMemory starting at offset ptr.

apiParam.apiDesc: The offset in domainMemory to start writing to
The Vector of ints to write into domainMemory

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write a Vector of ints into domainMemory starting at offset ptr.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Write an actionscript string as UTF8 data into domainMemory

apiReturn.apiDesc: The number of bytes written

apiParam.apiDesc: The location in domainMemory where the string will be written. You must ensure that this points to a buffer in the flascc world that has enough space to hold the string data or this method will overwrite other data within your program. Consider using mallocString instead as it will allocate the correct amount of space.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Write an actionscript string as UTF8 data into domainMemory

apiValue.shortdesc: A reference to the current Console object, it is set when one of the start methods is called

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: A reference to the current Console object, it is set when one of the start methods is called

apiValue.shortdesc: A reference to the current rootSprite so that flascc code has an easy way of getting to the stage regardless of what preloaders might be employed.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: A reference to the current rootSprite so that flascc code has an easy way of getting to the stage regardless of what preloaders might be employed.

apiValue.shortdesc: Returns true if the current environment supports use of ActionScript Workers with flascc content

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Returns true if the current environment supports use of ActionScript Workers with flascc content

apiValue.shortdesc: Return the current kernel implementation

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Return the current kernel implementation

apiValue.shortdesc: Returns the ByteArray object using as RAM

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Returns the ByteArray object using as RAM

apiValue.shortdesc: Returns a boolean indicating whether Flash out of memory conditions when growing the domainMemory ByteArray will throw an ActionScript exception.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Returns a boolean indicating whether Flash out of memory conditions when growing the domainMemory ByteArray will throw an ActionScript exception. The default is false, malloc will return an appropriate failure and new/new[] will throw a std::badalloc C++ exception.

apiValue.shortdesc: The current VFS implementation

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: The current VFS implementation

apiClassifier.shortdesc: A basic implementation of a console for FlasCC apps.

apiClassifierDetail.apiDesc: A basic implementation of a console for FlasCC apps. The PlayerKernel class delegates to this for things like read/write, so that console output can be displayed in a TextField on the Stage.

apiConstructor.shortdesc: To Support the preloader case you might want to have the Console act as a child of some other DisplayObjectContainer.

apiConstructorDetail.apiDesc: To Support the preloader case you might want to have the Console act as a child of some other DisplayObjectContainer.

apiOperation.shortdesc: Helper function that traces to the flashlog text file and also displays output in the on-screen textfield console.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: Helper function that traces to the flashlog text file and also displays output in the on-screen textfield console.

apiOperation.shortdesc: The enterFrame callback is run once every frame.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The enterFrame callback is run once every frame. UI thunk requests should be handled here by calling CModule.serviceUIRequests() (see CModule ASdocs for more information on the UI thunking functionality).

apiOperation.shortdesc: The PlayerKernel implementation will use this function to handle C process exit requests

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The PlayerKernel implementation will use this function to handle C process exit requests

apiOperation.shortdesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C fcntl requests to the file "/dev/tty." See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C fcntl requests to the file "/dev/tty." See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiOperation.shortdesc: All of the real FlasCC init happens in this method, which is either run on startup or once the SWF has been added to the stage.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: All of the real FlasCC init happens in this method, which is either run on startup or once the SWF has been added to the stage.

apiOperation.shortdesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C ioctl requests to the file "/dev/tty." See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C ioctl requests to the file "/dev/tty." See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiOperation.shortdesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C IO read requests to the file "/dev/tty" (for example, reads from stdin will expect this function to provide the data).

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C IO read requests to the file "/dev/tty" (for example, reads from stdin will expect this function to provide the data). See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiOperation.shortdesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C IO write requests to the file "/dev/tty" (for example, output from printf will pass through this function).

apiOperationDetail.apiDesc: The PlayerKernel implementation uses this function to handle C IO write requests to the file "/dev/tty" (for example, output from printf will pass through this function). See the ISpecialFile documentation for more information about the arguments and return value.

apiValue.shortdesc: Provide a way to get the TextField's text.

apiValueDetail.apiDesc: Provide a way to get the TextField's text.
